alerts.headline: Coastal Flood Advisory issued February 23 at 9:08PM EST until February 24 at 6:00AM EST by NWS Boston/Norton MA
alerts.description:
* WHAT...Shallow flooding less than one foot deep around the time
of high tide early Tuesday morning.

* WHERE...Eastern Massachusetts coast including Cape Cod and the
Islands.

* WHEN...From 2 AM to 6 AM EST Tuesday.

* IMPACTS...Flooding of vulnerable lots, parks, and roads with
only isolated road closures expected.

nws_forecast.name: Overnight
nws_forecast.detailed: Mostly cloudy, with a low around 21. Northwest wind around 14 mph, with gusts as high as 33 mph.

nws_forecast.name: Tuesday
nws_forecast.detailed: Mostly sunny, with a high near 30. Northwest wind 9 to 13 mph, with gusts as high as 29 mph.

nws_forecast.name: Tuesday Night
nws_forecast.short_forecast: Partly Cloudy then Slight Chance Light Snow
nws_forecast.detailed: A slight chance of snow after 5am. Partly cloudy, with a low around 14. Southwest wind 6 to 9 mph. Chance of precipitation is 20%. New snow accumulation of less than half an inch possible.

nws_forecast.name: Wednesday
nws_forecast.detailed: Snow before 11am, then rain and snow between 11am and 3pm. Cloudy, with a high near 39. South wind 7 to 12 mph. Chance of precipitation is 100%. New snow accumulation of 1 to 3 inches possible.

nws_forecast.name: Wednesday Night
nws_forecast.detailed: Partly cloudy, with a low around 28. Southwest wind around 9 mph.

nws_forecast.name: Thursday
nws_forecast.short_forecast: Partly Sunny then Chance Light Snow
nws_forecast.detailed: A chance of snow after 2pm. Partly sunny, with a high near 38. West wind 6 to 9 mph. Chance of precipitation is 30%. New snow accumulation of less than half an inch possible.

nws_forecast.name: Thursday Night
nws_forecast.detailed: A chance of snow. Mostly cloudy, with a low around 23. West wind around 7 mph. Chance of precipitation is 50%. New snow accumulation of 1 to 3 inches possible.

nws_forecast.name: Friday
nws_forecast.short_forecast: Chance Light Snow then Mostly Sunny
nws_forecast.detailed: A chance of snow before 11am. Mostly sunny, with a high near 37. Northwest wind around 7 mph. Chance of precipitation is 30%. New snow accumulation of less than one inch possible.

nws_forecast.name: Friday Night
nws_forecast.detailed: Partly cloudy, with a low around 25. Southwest wind around 7 mph.

nws_forecast.name: Saturday
nws_forecast.detailed: Mostly sunny, with a high near 42. Southwest wind around 10 mph.

nws_forecast.name: Saturday Night
nws_forecast.detailed: Partly cloudy, with a low around 29. Southwest wind around 8 mph.

nws_forecast.name: Sunday
nws_forecast.detailed: Mostly sunny, with a high near 37. Northwest wind around 10 mph.

nws_forecast.name: Sunday Night
nws_forecast.detailed: Mostly clear, with a low around 12. Northwest wind around 10 mph.

nws_forecast.name: Monday
nws_forecast.detailed: A chance of snow. Mostly sunny, with a high near 26. Northwest wind around 10 mph.
